steps.title: Focus on the two artworks
steps.content: The student wants a difference between Above and Below and Silver Upper White River. The notes give a direct material contrast: one uses aluminum tubing, and the other uses recycled silver.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated details
steps.content: Choice A gives a broad similarity. Choice C brings in the Vietnam Veterans Memorial instead of comparing the two named works. Choice D mentions only Above and Below after the memorial. The direct material contrast best fits the goal. The answer is B.
